title: dockg knowledge-graph frontmatter (0.4)
description: SKOS concept fields plus PROV-O provenance under the top-level `kg` key, consumed by dockg build and fill. 0.4 changes kg.provenance to an array with one entry per model, so multi-model fills keep truthful attribution; the 0.2/0.3 single-object form remains accepted. Files without a `kg` key pass.

prefLabel.description: Preferred label of the concept this document is primarily about.

altLabels.description: Alternative labels (synonyms, abbreviations) for the primary concept.

subjects.description: Subject labels for this document; behaves like tags.

revisionOf.description: Repo-relative paths or URLs of earlier documents this one revises (prov:wasRevisionOf).

derivedFrom.description: Repo-relative paths or URLs this document was derived from (prov:wasDerivedFrom).

generatedBy.description: Model or tool that generated this document's content (prov:wasGeneratedBy).

oneOf.description: One attribution entry per model (written by dockg fill).

provenance.description: Attribution for machine-proposed kg fields; humans delete entries they have reviewed. The single-object form is the deprecated 0.2/0.3 shape.

generatedBy.description: Model that proposed the machine-filled kg fields.

fields.description: Which kg fields this model proposed (written by dockg fill).
